base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of materia_icons — a pickup_item (power_item) from 1997 final fantasy vii. Materia orbs — 5 types (Magic green / Command yellow / Support blue / Independent purple / Summon red) × 48 distinct materia. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Materia orbs — 5 types (Magic green / Command yellow / Support blue / Independent purple / Summon red) × 48 distinct materia
